project.name: Inspecto — security module (Standard edition, optional)
project.description: OPTIONAL Standard-edition Authenticator (W6, docs/EDITIONS.md "Security direction"): an OIDC resource server that validates IAM-issued (Keycloak/WSO2/Okta/Entra) JWTs via Nimbus JOSE+JWT + JWKS and resolves claims -> Roles -> Capabilities (docs/superpower/rbac-groundwork.md). Discovered by the core's ServiceLoader seam (com.gamma.control.Authenticator) -- dropping THIS jar on the classpath (+ -Dauth.oidc.issuer / -Dauth.oidc.jwksUri) is what turns authentication on. The Personal edition never bundles it and stays auth-free -- exactly how inspecto-connectors and inspecto-agent-hosted isolate their own optional dependencies from the lean core. Only built as part of the reactor under the "edition-standard" profile (see the parent pom's profile-scoped <modules>), so a routine "mvn -o clean test" (Personal) never touches this module at all.
